author: Tolong Siki community (tolongsiki.com)
notes: Keyboard-mapping font (105 cps all in U+20..U+B7). Remap derived from published keyboard layout (kurukhtimes.com documentation PDF); 51/54 assigned Tolong Siki codepoints mapped. The 3 signs (SELA, HECAKA, UNGGA — Unicode 17 additions) have no documented ASCII mapping in Kelly Tolong 4 and may not exist in the font.
